goal_objective: Access to adequate, nutrition-diversified, safe and affordable food for all Kenyans.
Contributes to sustainable and sufficient production and food supply systems; and to integrated natural resource management and biodiversity restoration.
Promote implementation of a conducive policy and legal framework for natural resources and strengthening land tenure and governance.
Contributes to sustained reduction of food loss and waste.
Contribute to sustainable food security, increased incomes and inclusive economic growth through gender, youth and social inclusion in the food system and land use.
